items.title: Policy paper: Industrial Strategy quarterly update: January to March 2026
items.summary: An update on delivery of commitments in the Industrial Strategy.

items.title: Business Secretary champions flagship investment in UK’s largest gigafactory
items.summary: Thanks to the UK’s Modern Industrial Strategy, 4,200 jobs have been secured following over £700 million of investment in the advanced manufacturing sector.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: ministerial overseas travel and meetings, October to December 2025
items.summary: Data on ministers’ overseas travel and meetings with external individuals and organisations.

items.title: Notice: Apply for the Heat Network Efficiency Scheme (HNES) Round 12
items.summary: The Heat Network Efficiency Scheme supports performance improvements to existing district heating or communal heating projects.

items.title: Call for input on potential powers to protect the UK from adverse economic pressure
items.summary: This call for input seeks views on whether the UK government should develop new powers to protect the UK from acts of adverse economic pressure.

items.title: Statutory guidance: UK Emissions Trading Scheme: offshore installations – location codes
items.summary: A list of offshore installations that have an assigned UN Code for Trade and Transport Locations (UN/LOCODE).

items.title: Policy paper: Industrial Strategy quarterly update: October to December 2025
items.summary: An update on delivery of commitments in the Industrial Strategy.

items.title: ‘Greater Together LA’, the largest ever UK trade mission to the US, attracts major corporate sponsors
items.summary: In partnership with world-leading financial, tech and cultural organisations, the UK Government’s GREAT Britain & Northern Ireland Campaign is holding a major expo in Los Angeles, California from 18th - 22nd May, 2026.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy Trends: UK renewables
items.summary: Data on the UK’s renewables sector, including capacity, electricity generation and liquid biofuels consumption.

items.title: Official Statistics: Average road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels
items.summary: Official statistics in development on average road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels

items.title: Notice: CCUS East Coast Cluster: NPT Pathfinder selection process
items.summary: Apply to the NPT Pathfinder selection process for non-pipeline transport CCUS projects seeking ECC Teesside network connection by 2032.

items.title: Hydrogen investment fuels South Yorkshire's next industrial era
items.summary: Major hydrogen project to create over 400 new jobs in technology that uses electricity to split water into hydrogen and oxygen.

items.title: Make Work Pay: Transfer of Undertakings (Protection of Employment) Regulations
items.summary: We are running a call for evidence on the 2014 Transfer of Undertakings (Protection of Employment) (TUPE) Regulations.

items.title: Make Work Pay: draft code of practice on trade union right of access
items.summary: We're seeking views on a draft code of practice on the new legal framework for trade unions’ access to workplaces.

items.title: Make Work Pay: trade union right of access
items.summary: We're consulting on how the new legal framework for trade unions’ right of access into workplaces should work in practice. We're seeking views on the practical and operational details of the framework.

items.title: Placing CE, or CE and UKNI marked products on the market in Northern Ireland
items.summary: What you need to do to comply with regulations which govern manufactured products placed on the Northern Ireland market.

items.title: Decision: Springwell Solar Farm Project: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision on an application for a solar farm in North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, under the Planning Act 2008.

items.title: Notice: CCUS East Coast Cluster: Teesside selection process
items.summary: Apply to take part in the ECC Teesside selection process for projects seeking connection to the Teesside network by 2032.

items.title: Research: Ambient gamma radiation dose rates across the UK
items.summary: Data received from fixed and mobile monitors measuring the ambient (background) gamma radiation dose rate across the UK.

items.title: Government approves UK’s largest power-producing solar farm
items.summary: 800 MW Springwell Solar farm given approval – the largest solar project in the UK terms of power generation.

items.title: Regulations: energy information
items.summary: Guidance for suppliers and dealers.

items.title: Regulations: ecodesign of energy-consuming products
items.summary: Guidance for manufacturers, their authorised representatives and importers.

items.title: Guidance: Open general licence (AUKUS nations)
items.summary: Licence allowing the export of dual-use items or military goods software or technology and trade of military goods, to, between and among Australia, the USA and the UK.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Building materials and components statistics: March 2026
items.summary: Statistics and analysis on the construction sector for March 2026.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/10: update to open general licence
items.summary: The Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU) has updated the open general licence, AUKUS Nations.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Policy paper: UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS): policy overview
items.summary: The role of the UK Emissions Trading Scheme in UK decarbonisation and how the UK ETS Authority is developing the scheme.

items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: Decision: The Morgan Offshore Wind Project Generation Assets Order 2025: Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to The Morgan Offshore Wind Project Generation Assets Order 2025.

items.title: Industrial energy price indices
items.summary: Quarterly and annual price indices for industrial fuels, in real and current terms, including and excluding the Climate Change Levy (CCL).

items.title: Guidance: Open general export licence military goods: collaborative project Typhoon
items.summary: Licence for the export of military goods for the production, development or maintenance of Typhoon aircraft.

items.title: Welsh households to save money on bills through heat networks expansion
items.summary: Households and businesses in Wales to save money on bills through expansion of low-carbon, low-cost heat networks.

items.title: Placing UKCA or CE marked products on the market in Great Britain
items.summary: What you need to do to comply with regulations which govern manufactured products placed on the market in Great Britain.

items.title: Research: Decent work: a review of evidence for effective prevention and detection of labour exploitation
items.summary: Draws on expert seminar evidence to explain the drivers of labour exploitation and outline recommendations to support fair, safe and secure work in the UK.

items.title: Policy paper: Code of practice for labour market enforcement undertakings and orders
items.summary: This code of practice sets out how the Fair Work Agency (FWA) will apply labour market enforcement undertakings and orders to reduce the risk of labour market offending.

items.title: Policy paper: Fair Work Agency: enforcement policy statement
items.summary: The regulatory tools and guiding structures utilised by the Fair Work Agency (FWA) to enforce labour market legislation within its remit.

items.title: Corporate report: Director of Labour Market Enforcement (DLME) concluding statement
items.summary: Assessment of the progress of the Labour Market Enforcement Strategy 2025 to 2026 and the impact of the DLME function from 2016 to 2026, when it was folded into the Fair Work Agency (FWA).

items.title: Whistleblowing: for prescribed persons
items.summary: Advice for prescribed persons on how to deal with whistleblowing disclosures.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Decision: North Killingholme Power Project: non-material change, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for a non-material change relating to a new thermal generating station that will operate as a Combined Cycle Gas Turbine (CCGT) plant.
